# Grow Up - Online Learning Platform

A modern, responsive React-based online learning and productivity platform.

## Project Overview
- **Name**: Grow Up
- **Type**: Online Learning Platform
- **Tech Stack**: React, Tailwind CSS, React Router
- **Features**: Landing page, Authentication, Dashboard, Editor, Courses

## Components to Create
1. Landing page with hero section, features, and CTA
2. Login/Register authentication pages  
3. Dashboard with navigation and overview
4. Text/Code Editor
5. Courses page

## Design Requirements
- Modern, clean UI with blue & purple gradients
- Fully responsive design
- Smooth animations and hover effects
- Professional typography (Poppins/Inter fonts)
